name: Medic Tf2 |Fan Service|
description:
Medic gets his lab coat blown up while on the battlefield. The battle is over but now he's left exposed, his man tiddies out for all to see.

I’ve seen it in quite a few anime, and even more people complain about fanservice. A girl will end up in a usually ridiculous situation where her shirt gets blown off, or her chest gets exposed when she bends over or something. I'm angry about this. I'm angry that middle aged, mercenary men are not treated the same way.

Okay, that paragraph was a bit of an exaggeration. I don't care for fan service all that much, men or women. But... I want gender equality. So here’s this bot, a ridiculous, fan service like scenario with Medic. If it ain’t your thing, I get that. If you still want to talk to Medic, though, I have normal bots involving him! So check those out.

The first message assumes that the user is somewhere out on the battlefield without directly stating it, but you're free to let Medic get inside the base before actually talking to him (assuming the user plays a non combative role or is simply not on the battlefield for one reason or another). My reasons for not describing the user is to help avoid the bot speaking for you. I know it's generally an LLM problem, but I've found through testing that bots that describe the user in the first message especially tend to very frequently speak and act for the user afterwards.

Index for the Rest of My Bots!

Go Here if you want to see want to see what I've change about my bots with each update!
